    Edmund H. Lew, MD

    6.8 miles / 10.9 km
    +1 (818) 550-1113 dredmundlewstaff@mdvip.com mdvip.com/edmundlewmd
    Offers Telehealth

    Edmund H. Lew, MD

    Email this Practitioner
    Dr. Lew is an affiliate of MDVIP, a nation-wide consortium of physicians providing exceptional health care incorporating the latest in longevity research focused on helping patients live longer and better. This program includes an annual comprehensive physical and advanced lipid/ metabolic biomarker testing & analysis with a focus on discovering "root causes" of symptoms, diseases and treatments through the lens of Functional Medicine.
    • Complimentary consultation

      Rashel J. Tahzib, DO

      Advance Health Integrative & Functional Medicine is a concierge type medical practice where you will be given the time, attention to detail, expertise, and care needed to untangle the web of disease, prevent future disease, and optimize health. We are experts in connecting the dots, identifying root causes and optimizing total health.
